name: steam-store-helper
description: Injects asset download controls directly into the official Steam Store action bar via standalone WebSockets.
summary: Asset download controls on every Steam Store game page
author: LumaForge

permissions.reason: Notify the local LumaForge backend when the user clicks download
Inject the action-bar button into Steam's CEF browser tabs via CDP WebSocket

capabilities.reason: Adds a download button to the Steam Store action bar
